name: Audley & Halmerend
description:
The parishes of Audley and Halmerend cover a number of former mining villages and neighbouring the small hamlet of Alsagers Bank.  A strong community spirit ensures there is always a coffee morning or village event happening.

The villages pride themselves on sports with Audley having three cricket clubs and its own football club. The area also has historical buildings including St James Church that pre-dates the 14th century.

Both villages are within easy access of the main road networks and only within a few miles from the M6 motorway.
